name: llm-code-auditor
description: Detect and fix likely LLM-generated code smells, over-engineering, brittle tests, hallucinated APIs, and redundant defensive code.

interface.shortDescription: Detect and fix AI-generated code smells
interface.longDescription: Audit generated or agent-written code with an umbrella skill plus targeted skills for abstraction pruning, boundary invariants, readable domain code, generated tests, dependency/API hallucinations, and performance simplicity. The plugin focuses on code that is direct, readable, efficient, testable, and easy to inspect for bugs without speculative layers or redundant checks.
defaultPrompt: Audit this code for LLM-generated patterns.
Review these tests for brittle LLM patterns.
